commands.review_summary:
The PR adds gateway config.set/apply handling that strips default-only empty bundled provider baseUrl/models before persistence, adds an RPC regression test, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. for the gateway-level case from source: current main validates config.set payloads against baseUrl minLength while runtime snapshots can contain baseUrl: "". The original Control UI user path is already covered by current-main UI sourceConfig submission.
commands.review_followup: Manual review is appropriate because the protected maintainer label and current-main overlap require deciding whether to carry gateway-side compatibility in addition to the existing UI fix.

target.title: fix: preserve provider defaults during config saves
target.body:
Summary
- Accept Control UI full-config saves when bundled model provider runtime defaults were materialized into the form.
- Strip default-only empty provider fields before persistence validation/write, while keeping the validated runtime config for restart/secret checks.
- Add a regression for an OpenAI provider with only agentRuntime configured.

Verification
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --write --threads=1 src/gateway/server-methods/config.ts src/gateway/server.config-patch.test.ts && git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server.config-patch.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed` via Testbox `tbx_01ksbxddc6ttg35pn70p59khr6`, GitHub Actions run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26349825377
- `autoreview --mode local --engine codex --model gpt-5.3-codex-spark --no-web-search`: clean, no accepted/actionable findings

Behavior addressed: Control UI config.set no longer rejects unrelated saves when an authored bundled provider omits baseUrl but config.get materialized baseUrl as an empty runtime default.
Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout plus Blacksmith Testbox changed gate.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: Wrote a source config with models.providers.openai.agentRuntime.id, loaded it through config.get, submitted the runtime-shaped config through config.set with baseUrl empty, and verified the save succeeds.
Evidence after fix: Added regression in src/gateway/server.config-patch.test.ts; focused test passed 23/23 and check:changed passed on Testbox.
Observed result after fix: config.set returns ok and persisted config contains the unrelated gateway port edit without persisting default-only baseUrl.
What was not tested: Live browser Control UI manual save; the gateway RPC path used by the UI is covered directly.

Fixes #85831.
target.author: steipete
